title: Women voters of Pipra demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Pipra has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Pipra assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Pipra show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Pipra
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Pipra assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Pipra triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Pipra, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: High stakes battle in Pipra as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Pipra. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Pipra
